items.title: Hyperparameter grid comparison
items.description: Compare ridge α values or random forest depths by mean CV score on the development set before selecting a winner for final test evaluation.

items.title: Model selection under limited data
items.description: When a fixed 80/10/10 split leaves too few validation rows, 5-fold or 10-fold CV on train+val yields a more stable comparison between algorithms.

items.title: Reporting uncertainty in benchmarks
items.description: Publish mean ± std of fold scores (or confidence intervals from repeated CV) so stakeholders see stability, not a single lucky partition.

items.title: Leakage-safe pipeline validation
items.description: Use CV with sklearn Pipelines so scaling, imputation, and feature steps refit per fold—critical before deploying tabular models to production.
